description: An architectural rendering of a large white triumphal arch topped by gold winged statues, set in a park beside a river, with the Lincoln Memorial and the Washington Monument visible in the distance under a blue sky. A title block along the bottom reads 'TRIUMPHAL ARCH - WASHINGTON, DC' and 'RENDERING', dated April 16, 2026, with a 'HARRISON DESIGN' label at the corner.
notable_text: TRIUMPHAL ARCH WASHINGTON, DC; RENDERING; HARRISON DESIGN
